title: ASCII Diagram Generation
scenario: Generate a nested directory structure represented as an ASCII diagram. The directory structure should be as follows: Root Directory (Home) contains a subdirectory (Documents) which contains two subdirectories (Work and Personal) and a file (Resume.pdf). The subdirectory (Work) contains two files (Report.docx and MeetingMinutes.pdf) and a subdirectory (Projects) which contains a file (ProjectPlan.docx).
constraints: Must be represented as a single line of text using ASCII characters
Directory and file names must be in lowercase

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the resulting ASCII diagram well-formed and correctly represents the directory structure?
Do all directory and file names appear in lowercase, and is the structure correctly represented as a single line of text?
Are the relationships between directories and files correctly established in the ASCII diagram?
